title: Senior Analyst - BCG Vantage - Operations and Marketing, Sales and Pricing
required_skills: 2+ years consulting experience (preferred) OR 4-6+ years in contact center industry
Contact Center / Customer Service expertise (>5,000 FTE transformations)
Technology experience: RPA, AI, digital service optimization
bonus_skills: Experience with contact center tech vendors (Zendesk, NICE, Qualtrics)
missing_skills: Contact center / customer service industry experience
RPA / AI / digital service optimization expertise
Customer service analytics (demand drivers, handling time, IVR)
Relevant industry experience (retail bank, telecoms, airline, utility)
core_responsibilities: Support client engagements with contact center expertise and analysis
Conduct call center data analysis to assess drivers of demand
Identify digital service and AI optimization levers
Define improvement business cases and delivery plans
Develop intellectual property and knowledge assets for BCG
recommended_emphasis: This is a weak match — contact center expertise is a core requirement not present in CV
HSBC programme management is the closest signal but is still far from contact center consulting
If proceeding, frame HSBC stakeholder analytics and Agile delivery as consulting-adjacent skills
German language is a positive signal
Score is below 30 — recommend discussing with user whether to skip
